title: Delicate Shaggy Croatian Egg Frittata
description: A savory and cozy Croatian dish featuring free-range eggs, perfect for a comforting meal, made without onion or garlic for a friendly flavor
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the beaten eggs, salt, and black pepper until well combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the milk and shredded cheese until the cheese is fully incorporated.
Add the milk and cheese mixture to the egg mixture and stir until well combined.
Stir in the chopped fresh parsley and dill.
Butter six scallop shells and place them in a large baking dish.
Pour the egg mixture into the prepared scallop shells.
Place the baking dish in a larger dish filled with hot water to create a bain-marie.
Bake for 25 minutes or until the edges are set and the centers are still slightly jiggly.
Remove the frittatas from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
